page: Microsoft Azure E8-2ds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Edsv6 family. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 1 physical Intel Xeon 8573C core running at 4.2 GHz. The processor includes 260 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512). The server is provisioned with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 32.0 GB per core. It also includes 472 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

Benchmark data reveals a divergence between single-core and multi-core performance. The server demonstrates strong single-core capabilities, scoring 2156.0 in Geekbench single-core tests and achieving a strong rating in single-threaded gzip compression at 31.32 GB/sec. However, due to its low core count of 2 vCPUs, multi-core and parallelized workloads show limitations. The Geekbench multi-core score is 2649.0, and the stress-ng multi-core performance is rated as poor. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with large-block read and write speeds scoring in the poor category at 21.49 GB/sec and 14.14 GB/sec respectively.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the E8-2ds_v6 offers a high density of memory relative to compute resources, making it suitable for memory-bound workloads that do not require high parallel processing power. The inclusion of 472 GB of local storage provides a built-in storage buffer without requiring external attachments. This configuration is suited for small-scale database operations, caching layers, memory-intensive single-threaded applications, and lightweight text processing tasks. It is less suitable for heavily multi-threaded applications, large-scale compilation, or intensive vector calculations.
description: Microsoft Azure E8-2ds_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the Edsv6 family, featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs on 1 physical Intel Xeon 8573C core clocked at 4.2 GHz. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing an exceptionally high memory-to-core ratio of 32.0 GB per core, alongside 472 GB of local storage. Single-core performance is strong, as evidenced by a Geekbench single-core score of 2156.0 and strong single-threaded gzip compression. However, multi-core capabilities are limited, with weak multi-core Geekbench and poor stress-ng multi-core results. Memory bandwidth is also relatively low. This server is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy, low-compute applications. It is best suited for small-scale databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive single-threaded tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8-2ds_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 2 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 472 GB local storage. It offers strong single-core performance but limited multi-core scaling for memory-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E8-2ds_v6 is an Intel-based memory-optimized server with 2 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 472 GB local storage for memory-intensive tasks.
tagline: An Intel-powered, memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and integrated local storage for memory-bound workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 2 vCPUs and 4.2 GHz clock speed
64.0 GB of RAM providing a high 32.0 GB per core memory density
472 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core performance in gzip compression and Geekbench
Limited multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth under heavy parallel loads
Suited for caching, small databases, and memory-intensive single-threaded tasks
